bronze.ADJUSTInstallsStoreStore.purpose: Install attribution from Adjust MMP. Primary source for user lifecycle.

bronze.ADJUSTReInstallsStoreStore.purpose: Reinstall events from Adjust. Used with InstallsStore to build user lifecycles.

bronze.AppleS2SNotificationsStore.purpose: iOS S2S purchase/subscription notifications. Priority 2 for subs pipeline.

bronze.ApplovinAdsImpressionStore.purpose: AppLovin ad impression data (detailed). Primary source for ad revenue pipeline.

bronze.ImpressionStore.purpose: Raw ad impressions from all sources.

bronze.OrganizationInfoStore.purpose: Organization info — provides vatIncomeMultiplier for USD conversion.

bronze.ProductPurchaseStore.purpose: Google Play IAP receipts. Used for validation. purchaseState=101 = refund.

bronze.ReceiptDataStore.purpose: iOS purchase receipt data for validation.

bronze.RevenueCatStore.purpose: Subscription events from RevenueCat (both platforms). Priority 1 source for subs pipeline.

bronze.SessionEventStore.purpose: Individual user events (29+ types). Main source for session and activity pipelines.
bronze.SessionEventStore.time_warn: Do NOT use timestamp (client SDK time — unreliable, wild dates).

bronze.StartEndSessionStore.purpose: Per-session open/close timestamps. NOT used in dbt pipeline — useful for independent duration stats.
bronze.StartEndSessionStore.time_warn: Do NOT use version — it's a row-version for dedup, NOT a time field.
notes: NOT used in the dbt pipeline. SessionEventStore feeds sessions.

bronze.SubscriptionPurchaseStore.purpose: Google Play subscription purchases. Priority 3 for subs pipeline.

bronze.TransactionStore.purpose: In-game economy transactions: spend (3.64B), receive from default/Ad/level/Bonus/reward/shop/quest.

bronze.VatStore.purpose: VAT rates by country for vatIncomeMultiplier calculation.

bronze.applovin_impression_data.purpose: AppLovin impression data — used in dbt pipeline for ad revenue.

bronze.inAppsStore.purpose: In-app purchases (56 fields). Primary IAP source. Revenue = price / currencyRatesDenominator * vatIncomeMultiplier.

bronze.start_end_session.time_warn: version is NOT a time field here.

gold.app_revenue_by_source_daily.purpose: Daily app revenue by source (ad, inapp, subs).

model_meta._join_strategy: 7 source CTEs processed independently (no joins), combined via UNION ALL. Each CTE applies platform normalization and revenue conversion. Filtered to 30-app allowlist.

source_model.formula: Constant naming the silver source table

gold.app_revenue_compare_daily.purpose: Daily revenue comparison: AppsYouLove vs Magify vs Apple vs Adjust vs AppLovin.

gold.applovin_ads_sources_comparison.purpose: Ad revenue comparison between AppLovin sources by geo/format.

gold.inapps_revenue_sources_comparison.purpose: In-app revenue comparison across data sources.

gold.ltv360d_correlation_sample.purpose: Pre-built LTV correlation sample (178 features) for ML feature analysis.

gold.monetization_curves.purpose: Cohort monetization curves — revenue accumulation over time by cohort.

model_meta._join_strategy: Reads from gold.ua_cohort_long. Builds per-cohort arrays via sumMap, then explodes to one-row-per-day via arrayJoin(range(mature_day_max+1)). No joins.

cohort_day.aggregation: Row explosion: 1 row per day 0..N where N = min(days_since_install, 400)

gold.subscription_purchases.purpose: Subscription purchase records. WARNING: price field is BROKEN.
notes: Price field is BROKEN — do not use for revenue calculations.

gold.ua_cohort_activity_utn.purpose: Cohort activity metrics by UTN (user type/network).

model_meta._join_strategy: Direct SELECT from gold.ua_user_lifetime_activity_daily, GROUP BY all dimension columns. No joins.

clients_sdk_utn.aggregation: COUNT DISTINCT users with at least 1 session (unlimited time, no maturity guard)

gold.ua_cohort_ad_24h_long.purpose: Long-format ad metrics in first 24h per cohort.

gold.ua_cohort_long.purpose: Long format cohort metrics — same data as ua_cohort_wide but tall format.

model_meta._join_strategy: 3 branches via UNION ALL: (1) installs from gold.ua_cohort_users on day_idx=0, (2) UA costs from silver.ua_costs on day_idx=0, (3) activity+monetization from gold.ua_user_lifetime_activity_daily. All unioned and SUM-aggregated per dimension group.

installs.aggregation: SUM. Non-zero only from installs_day0 CTE: count() on day_idx=0

impressions.aggregation: SUM. Non-zero only from costs_day0 CTE

clicks.aggregation: SUM. Non-zero only from costs_day0 CTE

cost.aggregation: SUM. Non-zero only from costs_day0 CTE

clients_sdk.aggregation: SUM. Distinct users with at least 1 session, from activity_and_monetization CTE

total_revenue_net.aggregation: Note: uses ad_revenue_GROSS (no net concept for ads)

gold.ua_cohort_report.purpose: Aggregated cohort report for dashboards and BI.

gold.ua_cohort_targets_vs_fact.purpose: UA cohort targets vs actual performance comparison.

gold.ua_cohort_targets_vs_fact_matched.purpose: Matched version of targets-vs-fact for aligned comparison.

gold.ua_cohort_users.purpose: User-level cohort attributes for cohort analysis.

model_meta._join_strategy: Direct SELECT from silver.users_scd2, no joins. Filters: install_date >= 2024-02-08, client_id not null/empty/zero-UUID.

gold.ua_cohort_wide.purpose: Wide pivoted cohort metrics with columns for d0/1/2/3/7/14/30/180/360.

model_meta._join_strategy: Main CTE from gold.ua_cohort_long pivoted into day-bucket columns (d0/1/2/3/7/14/30/180/360) via sumIf. LEFT JOIN to gold.ua_payers for payer bucket metrics. LEFT JOIN to gold.ua_cohort_activity_utn for active_users_utn. All joins on 9-column dimension key.

gold.ua_payers.purpose: Lifetime payer flags — identifies payers and their characteristics.

model_meta._join_strategy: UNION ALL of inapp purchases (event_name='purchase') and subscription purchases, then INNER JOIN to gold.ua_cohort_users to pin purchases to correct user lifetime window (event_date >= lifetime_start_date AND < lifetime_end_date). Aggregated per user lifetime.

purchases_total.aggregation: COUNT of all purchases in lifetime window

gold.ua_user_lifetime_activity_24h.purpose: Same grain as daily but restricted to 24-hour install window metrics.

gold.ua_user_lifetime_activity_daily.purpose: Main fact table for LTV prediction. Grain: (client_id, application, day_idx). Partitioned by toYYYYMM(event_date).
gold.ua_user_lifetime_activity_daily.lineage: Built from 4 silver CTEs: activity_daily, inapp_daily, subscription_daily, ad_revenue_daily. User lifetime via ASOF JOIN on silver.users_scd2.
notes: day_idx = dateDiff('day', toDate(install_time), event_date). Calendar-day based.
user_lifetime_id = app_name|client_id|install_time. Multiple lifetimes per user (reinstalls).
Columns added April 2026: install_time, install_device_name, install_device_type.

model_meta._join_strategy: 4 CTEs (activity/inapp/subscription/ad_revenue) are enriched via LEFT ASOF JOIN on silver.users_scd2 (install_time <= event_time), then UNION ALL and re-aggregated. Final INNER JOIN back to user_lifetimes for dimension columns.

event_date.formula: activity_date_utc or toDate(event_time) or event_date depending on CTE

sessions_count.aggregation: SUM across UNION ALL of 4 CTEs, GROUP BY (event_date, application, client_id, user_lifetime_id)

app_version_last.aggregation: argMax (picks activity CTE value over others)

purchases.formula: sum(countIf(event_name='purchase')) from inapp + countIf(event_name='purchase' AND period_type='normal') from subs

inapp_revenue_gross.aggregation: SUM. Price is net USD from silver.inapp_table (already converted via calc_price_usd macro)

subs_revenue_net.formula: sumIf(if(event_name='purchase', 1, -1) * abs(price), (event_name='purchase' AND period_type='normal') OR event_name='refund')
subs_revenue_net.aggregation: SUM. Only normal-period purchases count, refunds subtract.

total_revenue_net.aggregation: Note: uses ad_revenue_GROSS (no net concept for ads)

gold.user_level_cohort_data_model.purpose: User-level cohort data model for dashboards.

silver.adjust_sessions_first_seen.purpose: First session per user from Adjust attribution data.

silver.application_platform_mapping.purpose: Lookup: application names to platforms (~104 rows).

silver.applovin_ad_user_daily.purpose: Ad revenue by user/day/ad_type. Replaces deprecated gold.ua_cohort_ad_24h_user.

silver.cohort_event_windows.purpose: Lookup: event time windows for cohort analysis (~141 rows).

silver.country_name_to_iso2.purpose: Lookup: country names to ISO-2 codes (~281 rows).

silver.currency_rates_scd2.purpose: SCD2 exchange rates (base USD). Used in calc_price_usd macro.

silver.inapp_table.purpose: Validated in-app purchases with net USD price. Purchases + refunds combined.

silver.magify_payments_events.purpose: Unified payment events. UNRELIABLE — intermediate table with duplicates.

silver.product_id_data_model.purpose: Product ID reference: product types, prices, durations.

silver.stg_inapp_purchases.purpose: Staging: validated IAPs (validator_matched=1). Validated via ReceiptData (iOS) / ProductPurchase (Android).

silver.stg_inapp_refunds.purpose: Staging: IAP refunds from ProductPurchaseStore.purchaseState=101 + AppleS2S.notification_type=REFUND.

silver.stg_subscription_event_context.purpose: Staging: enrichment context for subscription events.

silver.stg_subscription_transactions.purpose: Staging: subscription transactions with multi-source priority (RevenueCat > AppleS2S > SubscriptionPurchase).

silver.stg_user_sessions.purpose: Staging: session boundaries from SessionEventStore, grouped by session_id.

silver.subscription_table.purpose: Full subscription lifecycle: RENEWAL, INITIAL_PURCHASE, TRIAL, CANCELLATION. Multi-source priority.

silver.user_activity_daily.purpose: Daily user activity: sessions_count, duration, event_count.

silver.user_sessions.purpose: View on stg_user_sessions — session boundaries from raw events.

silver.users.purpose: User attributes (46 columns). Was reportedly deleted April 7 but exists — may have been recreated.
notes: Was reportedly deleted April 7, 2026 but exists — may have been recreated.

silver.users_scd2.purpose: SCD2 slowly-changing dimension for user lifecycles. Contains install_time, media_source, lifetime boundaries.
silver.users_scd2.lineage: From bronze.ADJUSTInstallsStoreStore + ADJUSTReInstallsStoreStore. install_time via parseDateTimeBestEffortOrNull().
